title: angelica mayebarana
intro: Angelica mayebarana, also known as Japanese Angelica or Mayebarana Angelica, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Angelica mayebarana include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
